productDisplayName: Puma Women Coral Black Casual Slippers
description: This absolutely stylish pair of coral flip flops from puma offers comfort at its best. The floral design on the footbed and the velvety straps give it unmatched urban cool. With circular grooves on the outsole offering grippy stability, it makes for great pool and beachwear too.UpperQuick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feetThong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and styleVelvety straps for soft, comfort and stylish feelMidsoleSoft, cushioned EVA footbed for step-in comfortFloral prints on the footbed for styleOutsoleTPR outsole with circular suction lugs for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
